subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-19
subcodes.first_line: In Teheran I spoke with a scholarly gentleman and gave him the divine Message.... My happiness is in these glad tidings and victories... While we were living in Bagdad one of the most honorable men in Persian came there. He called
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause
